testcase.name: verifyPageTitle

failure.message: Page Title Not Display Correct expected [Fuel Pump - SCMS] but found [Baramati Agro Ltd. Pimpli , Baramati , Maharashtra , Pune, 413102, India]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Page Title Not Display Correct expected [Fuel Pump - SCMS] but found [Baramati Agro Ltd. testcase.name: verifyBlockFunctionality

failure.message: Fuel Pump Block Success Message Not Display Correct :Diesel Pump has been Blocked. expected [Fuel Pump has been Blocked.] but found [Diesel Pump has been Blocked.]

testcase.name: verifyUnblockFunctionality

failure.message: Fuel Pump Unblock Success Message Not Display Correct :Diesel Pump has been Activated.Display expected [Fuel Pump has been Activated.] but found [Diesel Pump has been Activated.]
